name: The Move/Turn in the Underworld
description: Underground, all distances are in feet — read inches as tens of feet. Movement comes in ~10-minute segments: two moves per turn (120 feet per move fully-armored), doubled in flight/pursuit with no mapping allowed. One turn in every hour must be spent resting, twice that after flight/pursuit. Searching, loading, listening, ESP'ing cost referee-adjudged fractions (ESP a quarter-turn; searching ten feet of wall, a full turn).
